description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a whimsical, pastel purple exterior adorned with playful illustrations of stars, clouds, planets, and a crescent moon, giving it a dreamy, cosmic theme. The front panel includes a large, slightly curved display screen framed by a decorative marquee with stylized text and star motifs. The control panel is equipped with a single joystick and several colored buttons, suggesting a single-player setup, and is decorated with matching pastel graphics. Below the control panel, a coin slot and speaker grille are visible, typical of classic arcade machines. The side panels are richly illustrated with celestial artwork and stylized text, enhancing the cabinet's visual appeal. The back of the cabinet is solid black with ventilation slats, indicating internal electronic components.
description: A pastel purple arcade game cabinet with whimsical cosmic artwork, a large display screen, and a single-player control panel with joystick and buttons. The sides feature stars, clouds, and planets, while the front includes a coin slot and decorative marquee.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display screen, decorative marquee, control panel with joystick and buttons, and coin slot below.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the pastel purple panel with stars, clouds, a planet, and stylized text.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid black panel with multiple ventilation slats and no decorative artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring similar cosmic artwork as the left, with a crescent moon, stars, and stylized text.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, slightly curved, large with a visible bezel around the edges.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and four colored buttons arranged in a row, set on a pastel purple panel with cosmic artwork.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features pastel purple background with stylized white text, stars, and whimsical cosmic imagery matching the cabinet's theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels are decorated with pastel illustrations of clouds, stars, planets, a crescent moon, and stylized text, all in a dreamy, cosmic theme.
